# Coverage

<!-- Generated by `cargo run -p gen-coverage` — do not edit by hand. -->

Stripe-compatible surface implemented by zebrafish, pinned to API version `2025-12-30`. The same matrix is served live at `GET /_config/coverage`; anything not listed answers with the 501 `not_implemented` envelope.
